# Chlorophyll structure representation

## Short Teaching Summary
Chlorophyll structure representation: In ball-and-stick models of chlorophyll molecules, magnesium is represented by the color green at the center. Map connection: this idea links by analogy_for to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
